name: Sveta Petka Church
description: This church is our first stop. It has been the starting point for the walk of my granddad
facts: Look closely at the left pillar; you can still see the markings left by stone masons from 300 years ago.

name: Savi Gelato & Specialty Coffee
description: The best espresso in the neighborhood. The owner, Savi, roasts the beans in the back every Tuesday.
facts: The building was originally a pharmacy in the 1920s—notice the original apothecary drawers behind the counter.

name: Kapana District
description: Walk the main street, which used to be a shopping destination for all the people in town
facts: The buildings are predominantly from the 19th centure and feature a xyz architecture.
